# How-to Guides

Practical step-by-step guides for the more experienced user.

To get new functionality onto a PandA, the typical pipeline is:
write a block ([](how-to/block)) → add it to an app ([](how-to/app)) →
build the FPGA image ([](how-to/build-fpga-image)) → install and select the
bitstream on the device
([meta-panda docs](https://pandablocks.github.io/meta-panda/how-to/choose-fpga-bitstream)).
